name: "WRS" Tee
description: Sometimes less is more. WRS. It sits light and breathable against the skin, layers easily under a flannel or light jacket, and holds its shape wear after wear. This shirt belongs in the hands of someone who prefers nights out chasing city lights, sunrise drives, and music that sounds best from an open window.Product features- 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton for a soft, breathable feel (lightweight 4.2 oz/yd²).- Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention and clean fit.- Side seams and tear-away label for comfort, structure, and minimal irritation.- Prints use DTF/DTG methods for crisp, detailed front and sleeve graphics; back text is subtle and precise.- REACH certified; responsibly manufactured (Bella+Canvas supply chain, humane, FLA and WRAP standards).Care instructions- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed- Tumble dry: low heat- Iron, steam or dry: medium heat- Do not dryclean

name: "White Rabbit West Coast" Tee
description: A laid-back, statement tee inspired by urban skate culture and late-night road trips along the Pacific coast. Bold, stacked lettering on the front reads like a poster from an indie zine, while the circular rabbit emblem and subtle sleeve patch add an underground, club-sticker vibe. The back carries a small, low-key line — “Follow the white rabbit.” — that feels like a secret handshake for those who know the scene. It sits light and breathable against the skin, layers easily under a flannel or light jacket, and holds its shape wear after wear. This shirt belongs in the hands of someone who prefers nights out chasing city lights, sunrise drives, and music that sounds best from an open window.Product features- 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton for a soft, breathable feel (lightweight 4.2 oz/yd²).- Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention and clean fit.- Side seams and tear-away label for comfort, structure, and minimal irritation.- Prints use DTF/DTG methods for crisp, detailed front and sleeve graphics; back text is subtle and precise.- REACH certified; responsibly manufactured (Bella+Canvas supply chain, humane, FLA and WRAP standards).Care instructions- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed- Tumble dry: low heat- Iron, steam or dry: medium heat- Do not dryclean

name: "Follow the White Rabbit" Tee
description: A soft, breathable tee that wears like a well-loved favorite from day one. Bold, graphic text on the front — “Follow the white rabbit.” — lands with playful mystery, while the back lists The White Rabbit Society and local chapters in a stacked, vintage-inspired layout. The white shirt keeps the black-and-green print striking and easy to layer under a denim jacket or over a hoodie for cooler nights. Designed for people who are drawn to underground music scenes, crate-digging collectives, and late-night swing or DJ sets, this shirt feels like a badge of belonging rather than loud branding. Lightweight Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton keeps the silhouette clean and comfortable; side seams and ribbed collar maintain shape through many wears; a tear-away label keeps the neckline itch-free. Wear it to shows, meetups, or when you want to signal you’re part of the crew.Product features- 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (lightweight 4.2 oz) for breathable comfort- Side seams and ribbed knit collar with seam for lasting shape and structure- Shoulder tape and tear-away label for stability and itch-free wear- Printed graphics via DTF/DTG methods ensuring crisp, vibrant front, back, and sleeve artwork- REACH certified blanks; sourced from Honduras; Bella+Canvas ethical manufacturing standardsCare instructions- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed- Tumble dry: low heat- Iron, steam or dry: medium heat- Do not dryclean

name: "Follow The White Rabbit" Big Foam Trucker
description: This structured foam trucker hat channels bold retro energy with neon-script lettering that reads “Follow the white rabbit.” The high-profile, seamless foam front gives the design a clean, raised look while the breathable mesh back keeps you cool on long days out. Sturdy, pre-curved visor and matching details (braid, undervisor, and sweatband) give it a finished, durable feel. Wear it when you’re chasing odd adventures, late-night conversations, or just adding an offbeat pop to a casual outfit. It sits confidently above the browline and snaps to a comfortable fit, letting the vibrant type and splash of color do the talking.Product features- High-profile 5-panel foam front with seamless lining- Breathable polyester mesh back with adjustable snap- Thick, laminated fabric for structure and longevity- Pre-curved visor with 8 rows of stitching and matching undervisor- Matching fabric braid and sweatband for polished finishCare instructions- Use warm water and dish soap and clean spots off your hat. It's not necessary to soak the whole item. For hard to clean spots use a soft bristled brush.

name: WRS Rabbit Trucker
description: Light, airy, and a little mischievous — this trucker cap brings easygoing style to everyday wear. The structured mid-profile front keeps the embroidered patch crisp, while the breathable mesh back lets summer air move freely. A curled Permacurv® visor shades your eyes with a matching underbill for a clean, finished look. The embroidered rabbit patch adds a playful, outdoorsy touch that pairs well with weekend hikes, farmstands, or coffee runs. Snap the adjustable closure to your fit and go — this cap is made to be worn, loved, and knocked around on warm days that lean into adventure.Product features- Structured six-panel with hard buckram front for a crisp embroidered patch- Permacurv® precurved visor with matching undervisor and eight-row stitching- Breathable 100% polyester mesh back to reduce heat and sweat- Adjustable plastic snap closure for a customizable, mid-profile fit- Cotton sweatband and durable 60/40 cotton-poly front for comfortable wearCare instructions- Use warm water and dish soap and clean spots off your hat. It's not necessary to soak the whole item. For hard to clean spots use a soft bristled brush.

name: WRS "OG Logo Back" Tee
description: SMLXL2XL3XL Width, in 18.00 20.00 22.00 24.00 26.00 28.00 Length, in 28.00 29.00 30.00 31.00 32.00 33.00 Sleeve length, in 8.23 8.50 8.74 9.02 9.25 9.49 Size tolerance, in 1.50 1.50 1.50 1.50 1.50 1.50 SMLXL2XL3XL Width, in 18.00 20.00 22.00 24.00 26.00 28.00 Length, in 28.00 29.00 30.00 31.00 32.00 33.00 Sleeve length, in 8.23 8.50 8.74 9.02 9.25 9.49 Size tolerance, in 1.50 1.50 1.50 1.50 1.50 1.50 A clean, soft tee for people who like subtle, curious style. The front shows a circular emblem with a white rabbit silhouette and thin neon-green accents — bold enough to catch the eye, quiet enough to layer. The back carries a small, typewriter-style line: “Follow the white rabbit.” It reads like an invitation: a quiet nudge toward curiosity, late-night conversations, and spontaneous adventures. Lightweight and breathable, this shirt becomes the go-to for coffee-shop hangs, low-key meetups, and wandering city nights. It wears like a favorite from the first day: smooth, unrestrictive, and matte in its print so the emblem stays sharp without feeling loud.Product features- 100% ring-spun cotton (lightweight 153 g/m²) for a soft, breathable feel- Tubular knit construction without side seams for a smooth, waste-reduced silhouette- Ribbed, elastic collar with shoulder tape to prevent stretching and retain shape- DTG front prints with DTF sleeve and inner-neck labeling for crisp, durable graphics- Pearlized tear-away label and Oeko-Tex certified fabric for comfortable, safe wearCare instructions- Do not dryclean- Do not bleach- Tumble dry: low heat- Iron, steam or dry: low heat- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F), with similar colors

name: "Follow Me" Tee
description: Nivens with a gentle entreaty to follow down the glowing rabbit hole to where the dance truly begins. A lightweight, ring-spun cotton tee that brings a gentle, whimsical touch to everyday wear. It sits comfortably at the chest on a clean crew neckline and a classic fit, pairing easily with jeans, layered looks, or loungewear. Wear it when you want something soft against your skin and a little story on your front: curious, thoughtful, and quietly playful.Product features- 100% ring-spun cotton (lightweight 153 g/m²) for a soft, breathable feel- Tubular knit construction—no side seams for a smooth, clean silhouette- Ribbed crew neckline with shoulder tape to maintain shape and prevent stretching- Pearlized tear-away label for itch-free comfort; meets Oeko-Tex and EU safety standards- DTG/DTF printing options for vibrant front artwork and detailed sleeve/neck printsCare instructions- Do not dryclean- Do not bleach- Tumble dry: low heat- Iron, steam or dry: low heat- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F), with similar colors

name: WRS "Rabbit Ticket" Tank
description: Get your ticket to follow the white rabbit. This slim fit tank will turn heads. Bystanders won't be disappointed and neither will you - the racerback cut looks good on any woman's shoulders..: Made with extra light fabric (60% combed, ring-spun cotton and 40% polyester: 4 oz/yd² (135 g/m²)) this racerback tank is supremely lightweight and an excellent choice for the active lifestyle..: The classic fit along make the tank a comfortable choice under high performance while the scooped neckline brings a sporty touch to the whole outfit. .: For a completely scratch-free experience, all tanks come with a tear-away label for unhindered performance on a daily basis..: Neck label print area is decorated with Direct-to-Film (DTF) or Direct-to-garment (DTG) methods.

name: "Precious Nivens" Crop Hoodie
description: Our precious Nivens appears looking very demure, very mindful, knowing that nothing looks more stylish and chic than a well-designed crop hoodie. As such, this one won’t disappoint. It’s not just a great look, it is also super comfy due to being made from soft three-end fleece with ultra tight-knit construction. It’s that tight-knitting that makes printed surfaces really stand out..: 85% combed, ring-spun cotton, 15% recycled polyester.: Medium fabric (7.0 oz /yd² (240 g/m²)).: Relaxed fit.: Raw bottom hem.: Soft 3-end fleece.: Under 5% shrinkage.: Tear-away label.: Storm is printed with the DTF (Direct-To-Film) decoration method

name: Follow the Nivens Hoodie
description: This midweight fleece hoodie wraps you in a quiet, curious energy — like slipping into a dream that leads somewhere unexpected. The front showcases the White Rabbit Society emblem, while a calm and captivating Nivens adorns the back with an entreaty to “FOLLOW THE WHITE RABBIT.” It reads gentle and whimsical, built for cold ballrooms at the end of a late-night social, slow mornings with a book, or late-night walks leading to serenity or adventure. The dropped shoulders and classic fit give a relaxed silhouette that layers easily over tees. Wear it when you want comfort that nudges toward wonder: cozy enough for coffee runs, breathable for travel days, and thoughtfully made with sustainable and socially responsible production standards.Product features- 2-piece color-matched jersey lined hood for warmth and clean lines- Relaxed fit with dropped shoulders for easy layering- Front pouch pocket for hands and small items- Medium-heavy 8.4 oz fabric: soft 80/20 ring-spun cotton/poly blend (color-dependent blends)- OEKO-TEX Standard 100, FLA partner and WRAP-certified manufacturingCare instructions- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F), gentle cycle- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed- Tumble dry: low heat- Iron, steam or dry: low heat- Do not dryclean

name: "Follow Nivens" Tee
description: This lightweight crew-neck tee carries a playful, slightly rebellious energy. A new WRS logo entreats you on the front, and an energized Nivens adorns the back, framed by the rallying line “Follow the White Rabbit,”ready to lead you onto the dance floor. The shirt feels breathable and easy to layer — wear it to shows, late-night meetups, or while wandering city streets hunting the next secret spot. The vibe is curious and adventurous: smart, a little mischievous, and unmistakably club-like. Thoughtful details like a tear-away label, ribbed collar, and side seams keep the fit neat and comfortable through repeated wear.This tee suits collectors of graphic streetwear and fans of modern, slightly retro-inspired illustration. It pairs well with denim, layered under an open flannel or bomber, or worn solo to make the neon rabbit the focal point. Suitable for evenings out, fan gatherings, conventions, or casual weekend outings where you want to signal curiosity and community.Product features- 100% Airlume combed & ring-spun cotton (lightweight 4.2 oz) for breathability and a soft hand- Retail crew-neck fit with ribbed knit collar, side seams and shoulder tape for shape and durability- Crisp, detailed prints: DTF or DTG techniques used depending on placement for vibrant, long-lasting graphics- Tear-away label for comfort; age: adult sizing; REACH certified- Multiple fabric blends for heathered colors; responsibly produced under fair-labor certificationsCare instructions- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed- Tumble dry: low heat- Iron, steam or dry: medium heat- Do not dryclean

name: "Dance Anyway - Nivens" Tee
description: This lightweight crew-neck tee brings playful energy to everyday wear. Our good friend Nivens bursts into action, encouraging everyone to “DANCE ANYWAY.” Neon green accents and motion lines give the artwork a cyberclub vibe. The retail fit sits cleanly for layering or standing alone, while the soft Airlume combed ring-spun cotton keeps things breathable during long days or late-night sets. Subtle sleeve prints echo the main design for a cohesive look that reads like streetwear with a wink. Wear it to a set, rehearsal, or while you’re out chasing beats — it carries movement, attitude, and a little bit of mischief.Product features- 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton for a soft, breathable feel- Retail crew-neck fit with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention- Side seams provide structure and longer-lasting shape- Printed labels and sleeve/graphic prints using DTF or DTG methods for crisp, vibrant detail- Tear-away label, REACH certified, ethically produced (Bella+Canvas sourcing)Care instructions- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed- Tumble dry: low heat- Iron, steam or dry: medium heat- Do not dryclean

name: WRS OG Rabbit Crop Hoodie
description: Nothing looks more stylish and chic than repping the White Rabbit Society in a well-designed crop hoodie. As such, this one won’t disappoint. It’s not just a super stylish crop-top hoodie, it is also super comfy due to being made from soft three-end fleece with ultra tight-knit construction. It’s that tight-knitting that makes printed surfaces really stand out..: 85% combed, ring-spun cotton, 15% recycled polyester.: Medium fabric (7.0 oz /yd² (240 g/m²)).: Relaxed fit.: Raw bottom hem.: Soft 3-end fleece.: Under 5% shrinkage.: Tear-away label.: Storm is printed with the DTF (Direct-To-Film) decoration method

name: "If It Glows" Tee
description: This relaxed, heavyweight tee brings playful attitude and street-ready comfort together. The garment-dyed cotton has a lived-in softness and depth of color that settles into your wardrobe like an old favorite. One of our core maxims: “IF IT GLOWS IT WON’T SAY NO” with a small rabbit motif.. Wear it to dance events, on late-night runs, to underground shows, or anytime you want to proclaim you are ready to say "YES" to a dance. The roomy fit and substantial 6.1 oz fabric feel steady on the body while the tubular knit and sewn-in label keep the silhouette clean. Sized from S to 4XL and offered in many colors, this tee is built to be lived in and lived up to.Product features- 100% ring-spun US cotton for durable, soft comfort- Garment-dyed finish for soft texture and vintage look- Heavyweight 6.1 oz fabric with relaxed fit- Tubular, no side seams and double-needle stitching for durability- Available S–4XL with a sewn-in labelCare instructions- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)- Do not bleach- Tumble dry: low heat- Iron, steam or dry: low heat- Do not dryclean
